system: You are a coding assistant with access to file system and shell tools. Always explain your reasoning before making tool calls. Prefer minimal, surgical changes.

messages.content: Refactor src/server/handlers/auth.py to use the new TokenValidator class from src/security/. The old code does manual JWT parsing and we want to remove that in favor of the validated type.

content.text: I'll start by reading both files to understand the current implementation.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the contents of a file

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write content to a file, creating or overwriting

tools.name: bash
tools.description: Execute a shell command and return stdout/stderr
